task_completion.description: Verify that the Avare application was opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Avare aviation GPS application interface.

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the ADS-B or external receiver settings within Avare.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the settings or preferences menu in Avare specifically for configuring external devices, ADS-B, or network connections.

task_completion.description: Verify the IP address is set to 192.168.10.1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show '192.168.10.1' entered into the IP address or host field for the external receiver in Avare's settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the port is set to 4000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show '4000' entered into the port field for the external receiver in Avare's settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration details were saved to /sdcard/adsb_config.txt in the correct format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of a terminal or text editor showing the contents of /sdcard/adsb_config.txt with exactly 'IP: 192.168.10.1' and 'Port: 4000' on separate lines.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent configured Avare using its graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with Avare's settings menus, rather than just using terminal commands to edit the com.ds.avare_preferences.xml file directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the output text file was genuinely created by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using a text editor or terminal commands (like echo or cat) to create and verify /sdcard/adsb_config.txt, rather than just displaying the task prompt.

integrity.description: Ensure the output file does not contain extraneous text copied from the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of /sdcard/adsb_config.txt should only contain the IP and Port lines as requested, without extra instructions or prompt text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected IP address for the Stratux ADS-B receiver is 192.168.10.1 and the expected UDP port is 4000. The Avare app preferences are stored at /data/data/com.ds.avare/shared_prefs/com.ds.avare_preferences.xml, but the agent should ideally use the app GUI to configure these settings. The final output must be saved to /sdcard/adsb_config.txt.
